skills.name: Cryptocurrency Security
skills.description: Comprehensive cryptocurrency security protection for DeFi protocols, centralized exchanges, wallets, and trading platforms. Detects private key leakage, seed phrase exposure, API key theft, and crypto-specific attacks.
skills.author: AI Security Guardian Team

skills.name: Web3 Security
skills.description: Comprehensive Web3 security protection for decentralized applications, smart contracts, and Web3 infrastructure. Detects OWASP Smart Contract Top 10 vulnerabilities, transaction security issues, dApp attacks, and protocol-specific threats.
skills.author: AI Security Guardian Team
